experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed AI-native multi-channel B2B order agent (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone) using Claude Sonnet and RAG, shipping intelligent software system end-to-end across 7 enterprise clients processing 1,000+ orders

Built React and Python internal tools for non-technical stakeholders: Intercom ticketing system (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 attachment store managing 250+ files

Engineered automated output-validation and human-in-the-loop QA layer for AI model failure detection; iterated on prompts and integrated vector-store correction memory, improving precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed Python wrapper around Grafanalib on 3-person team, achieving 83% code reduction (30+ lines to 5) through intelligent abstraction and data processing optimization
Migrated 7+ legacy dashboards across 3 active Grafana environments with comprehensive unit tests on the dashboard layer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Building intelligent professor review platform for 30,000+ students using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Drizzle ORM with data processing pipelines
Shipped review submission flow and Python GraphQL webscraper for automated course data ingestion across agile sprints

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

skills.AI & Machine Learning: Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini API, LangChain, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Vector Stores, MCP, Scikit-Learn
skills.Frameworks & Libraries: React.js, FastAPI, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Flask, Spring Boot
skills.Data Processing & Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS (EC2/S3), Docker, WebSockets, MNE

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Owned end-to-end AI-native matching platform at internshipmatcher.com (live in production): React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, multi-tier data processing layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3), and Clerk JWT auth via JWKS

Designed dual-model Claude AI pipeline (Haiku 4.5 for fast skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for deep re-ranking of top 30 to top 10) achieving 95%+ accuracy; SSE-streamed progress events to React frontend in real time
Parallel data processing of 30+ positions with 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) via dynamic batching and prompt caching

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated AI-driven PSG sleep-stage scoring platform with machine learning achieving 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy, validated against clinician-labeled hypnograms from Sleep-EDF dataset
Async EEG data processing pipeline (Redis + ARQ): distributed EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction, Scikit-Learn classifiers per patient
Sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for QA review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Built and deployed autonomous AI agent for lead-qualification via SMS: FSM-driven intelligent software system with intent classification, debounce sweeper, and Cal.com auto-booking of qualified leads
Multi-service AI integration: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) on async Postgres with Alembic migrations and APScheduler
Live in production for Bay Area real estate client, auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach
